message:
refactor(util): extract ExpandPath to shared utility function

Consolidates duplicate expandPath implementations from multiple packages
into a single, well-documented util.ExpandPath function. This reduces
code duplication and ensures consistent behavior across the codebase.

Changes to internal/util/dirs.go:
- Add ExpandPath(path string) string function that expands leading "~/"
  or "~\\" to user's home directory
- Handles edge cases: empty string, bare "~", and paths without prefix
- Explicitly does NOT expand "~user/..." (shell-specific behavior)

Refactored packages (removed local expandPath):
- internal/archive/archiver.go: DefaultArchiverOptions, NewArchiver
- internal/events/logger.go: DefaultOptions, NewLogger
- internal/scoring/tracker.go: DefaultTrackerOptions, NewTracker
- internal/notify/notify.go: path expansion for notification config

Net result: -23 lines (removed 3 duplicate implementations, added 1 shared)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
